title: glochidion atalotrichum
intro: Glochidion atalotrichum, also known as the forest hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The extracts from Glochidion atalotrichum have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to aid in digestion and boost the immune system.
